content.en:
"Have you found out the identity of that Heavy Palace Secret Master?" asked Luo Can, the president of the Maple Leaf Chamber of Commerce.

Black Mountain shook his head, "I only know that it is called Ye Tian, it was originally an ordinary One Heaven cultivator of our Zilan Mountain, and it seems that he was not called Ye Tian, but later changed to this name." I don't have any background, and suddenly I became a secret master of the Heavy Palace, and I suspect that some outsider has changed his identity, and now he is a cultivator of the Four Heavens. "

"Could it be that Ye Tian himself is an ordinary cultivator of our Zilan Mountain, but he just accidentally got the opportunity?" Luo Can guessed.

"It's unlikely, cultivation can skyrocket, but the Heavy Palace Secret Master can't be created all at once, and it takes a long time to refine the Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid before he can become a powerful Heavy Palace Secret Master. Therefore, Ye Tian must be from the outside world, and his current identity is just a cover-up. Of course, the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce will not care about his true identity. "Montenegrin Road.

"First find a way to try to contact that Ye Tian to see if you can win him over, if you can't win him over, kill him!"

Luo Can proposed.

With the strength of their several chambers of commerce, it was undoubtedly a very simple matter to kill a cultivator of the Quadruple Heavenly Cultivation.

However, Ye Tian had been staying within the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce during this time, and he had been practicing the rest of the time except for refining the Chonggong Xuan Liquid.

......

Without the outside world knowing, Ye Tian's doppelganger's cultivation improved rapidly.

The Fourth Heaven Third Order!

Fourth Heaven Fourth Order!

The Fourth Heaven Fifth Order!

His cultivation has improved too quickly, in order to prevent his cultivation from improving too quickly to attract attention, he has also researched and created a special secret method of the Heavy Palace, which can cover his own cultivation, unless he is higher than many great realms, he can't see through his hidden.

It didn't take long for Li Changsheng to use a large amount of ten-percent pure hundred-yuan Xuan liquid to raise his cultivation to the Fifth Heaven Realm, and it was still rapidly improving.

Anyway, he is not short of resources now, so he has not gone out, and he is ready to improve his strength to a certain level before going out.

Ye Tian didn't go out, which undoubtedly made it impossible for other forces to win him over and deal with him.

After a long time, the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce has passed the most dangerous period, and it is even cultivating a new Heavy Palace Secret Master, but it is still Ye Tian who really relies on it.

Ye Tian has even begun to study refining the Intermediate Heavy Palace Liquid now, mainly because if he wants to continue to improve his cultivation quickly, the effect of the low-level Heavy Palace Liquid is not too high, so he naturally needs the Intermediate Heavy Palace Liquid.

The Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce has many secret recipes for the Intermediate Heavy Palace Liquid, and Ye Tian easily obtained it, and then refined it very easily, and the purity is also maintained above eighty-five, and the medium-grade Xuanliquid with the purity of eighty-fifty is already very high.

If you take out more than ninety percent pure intermediate Xuan liquid, I am afraid that even more powerful forces will intervene.

Therefore, Ye Tian is very low.

However, all he had refined for himself was a ten-percent purity of intermediate-grade Xuanli, and with the assistance of ten-percent purity intermediate-grade Xuanli, his cultivation had quickly improved to the sixth heaven, and he was rapidly progressing towards the seventh-level heaven.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also browsed many heavy palace exercises from the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, as well as some ancient classics, and made up for his systematic knowledge of this time and space line by browsing these, which was of great significance to him to improve his Ten Thousand Methods Heavy Palace in the future.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

Ye Tian's replica body was still practicing here, and suddenly, he received information from another time-space line clone.

"I didn't expect it to take so long for the information of another clone to be transmitted, and it was too difficult to transmit information across the time and space line~. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, he knows about the situation of another time and space line, and he has a little confidence in his heart, and the completely different cultivation system has given him a lot of gains.

But the strength of his clone is still too weak, and he has not yet come into contact with the true mysteries of another space-time line, and he has to improve the strength of that clone and become the top existence of that space-time line, so that he can hope to spy on the secrets of a higher realm.

"That clone continues to work hard to improve its strength, and I have to continue to improve my strength here, first raising the ultimate rules of cultivation and ten thousand laws to the limit!"

Ye Tian closed his eyes and continued to practice.

......

"It's the seventh heaven!"

Ye Tian felt the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace of the First Order of the Seventh Heaven in his body, and the mana in his body was already very terrifying.

However, compared to his cultivation, his physical body is still a little weak.

The main reason is that his cultivation has improved too quickly, and his physical body refining can't keep up.

Immediately, he combined the knowledge of another time and space line to create a secret method that could refine the physical body, allowing the physical body to be tempered to the true physical limit.

This secret method is called the Ten Thousand Methods Heavy Palace Quenching Technique!

Countless mana passed through the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace in his body, turning into pure flame power and constantly refining his physical body, his physical body became stronger and stronger, and his strength continued to skyrocket.

Although his cultivation has not improved, his strength is skyrocketing, and with the emperor-level heavy palace secret method and heaven-level heavy palace secret method he created, with his current strength, it is enough to kill the heavy palace cultivator of the ninth heavenly cultivation.

However, it is still a little difficult to deal with the cultivators of the Tenth Heaven, but there is no problem in saving their lives.

And the strongest person in Zilan Mountain is only a cultivator of the thirteenth heaven, and there are very few cultivators above the tenth heaven, they are all old monsters who have lived for many years, and they belong to the background of the major forces of Zilan Mountain, and he is not easy to encounter.

... Good...

Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce.

The high-level officials of Montenegro and other chambers of commerce gathered together to discuss Ye Tian's matter again.

"'~ Ye Tian must die, this guy can refine eighty percent of the purity of the intermediate Xuan liquid, our business has been severely suppressed, this guy has not come out, it is inevitable that he will not be co-opted, then he must be killed!"

"How can you kill him? He hides inside the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce and doesn't come out!"

"Find a reason to attack the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, you don't need to really kill them, just drag them down, and then ask a killer from the Dark Temple to attack and kill Ye Tian, as long as you invite a killer from the Seventh Heaven Cultivation, Ye Tian will definitely die!"

"Then let's do it!"

After they had agreed, they paid a certain price to invite the killers of the Dark Temple.

The Dark Temple was preparing to dispatch a Seventh Heaven Ninth Order killer, such a killer would be feared even by a Eighth Heaven First Order cultivator.

In their opinion, this plan is foolproof!
